notes: fundingTime documented as settlement time in Unix ms (REST docs: 'Settlement time, Unix timestamp format in milliseconds'). Availability judged under G06, not here.

Archive CSV schema: instrument_name,funding_rate,funding_time — single rate column. REST distinguishes fundingRate (predicted) vs realizedRate (actual settled) but the archive carries no such field. Archive funding_rate cannot be officially classified predicted vs realized without a documented mapping. Under-specified.

Archive CSV has no formulaType column. Official announcement (RFA) states the new formula rolled out in 3 batches from April 10, 2025, but no archive carries formulaType, so the boundary cannot be verified from archive data. Changelog (RCL) 2025-04-28 entry is AWS-domain cessation, not the formula transition. Transition-boundary verification incomplete.

2026-07-19 archive: 231 instruments at 8h, 194 at 4h, 1 at 2h, 1 at 1h (by funding_time differences). Mechanism article (R06B): cycles 1h/2h/4h/8h. API documentation (R04B) additionally mentions possible 6h adjustment. Formal rules (adjacent-event, cross-day, tolerance, frequency-transition encoding) NOT documented. PARTIAL and BLOCKING.

ETag/Content-MD5 verify current-object bytes (R01/R02/R12 pass integrity). Provider replacement/correction behavior is undocumented. R01 Last-Modified 2026-02-02 and R12 Last-Modified 2025-12-17 date the current representations. They cannot distinguish initial backfill from replacement. Replacement/correction behavior unknown.

Historical endpoint exists (landing page R05 confirms module 3; introduction date not stated on page — September-2025 claim removed). PASS only with a conservative 2026 availability bound based on the audit/acquisition context. Do not claim 2022 availability; R01 provides no proof of 2022 availability. BTC transition-boundary archives around April 24, 2025 were NOT acquired in this audit.

Evaluated strictly against intended internal research use: acquisition of publicly available funding data and retention of metadata/hashes for internal non-commercial research. OKX API Agreement §9.4 restricts Market Data to non-commercial use and prohibits redistribution. Internal acquisition and metadata retention are within permitted non-commercial scope; redistribution is outside this gate and was not attempted. However, whether §9.4's non-commercial restriction permits this specific internal research acquisition unambiguously is not expressly stated — gate FAILS on that ambiguity, not on absence of redistribution rights.

Register rebuilt with bodies/headers separated, exact URLs, corrected hashes/sizes/row counts/timestamp bounds/interval sets/ETags/Last-Modified/HTTP statuses. R08-R10 are POST download-link responses; exact POST request bodies were NOT retained and re-fetch returns 429/param errors, so request identity for those rows is incomplete. FAIL until exact request bodies captured; do not claim they were captured.

Fail-closed: G02 (partial, blocking), G03 (fail), G04 (partial, blocking), G05 (fail), G07 (fail), G08 (fail). G01 PASS, G06 PASS with 2026 bound. Settlement semantics, interval distribution, and 2026 availability documented; predicted/realized archive distinction, formulaType transition, replacement policy, licensing ambiguity, and full request identity remain unresolved.
